name: Lili Hair Salon
tagline: Real hair care. Real people. Real results.
about: Lili Hair Salon has been a Berkeley fixture where neighbors come to feel heard and leave feeling amazing. We're not trying to be fancy—we're just good at what we do, whether you need a fresh cut, color that actually matches your vision, or just someone who listens while they work. With nearly 4.7 stars from folks in the community, we've built something pretty special on Shattuck Ave.
